title: Progress+
description: This mod adds 42 new achievements on a variety of topics. If you are tired of vanilla achievements or you have already completed them all. With this mod, you can challenge yourself to do them all!
body:
This mod adds 42 new achievements on a variety of topics. If you are tired of vanilla achievements or you have already completed them all. With this mod, you can challenge yourself to do them all!
Progress+ adds achievements that are more suitable not for survival, but for RPG gameplay. By type: put a block of land, craft or get something: A watch, a book, a leather helmet. Or find some kind of biome: Desert, ice peaks.
